task.title: Lenovo NL to YAML closed-loop check

command: import json,pathlib,sys,time; p=pathlib.Path.home()/'.urirun-node'/'notes.jsonl'; p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); rec={'at':time.time(),'text':sys.argv[1]}; p.open('a', encoding='utf-8').write(json.dumps(rec)+'\n'); print(json.dumps(rec))

command: import json,subprocess,sys; limit=int(sys.argv[1]); cmd=['ps','-eo','pid=,comm=,pcpu=,pmem=','--sort=-pcpu']; out=subprocess.check_output(cmd, text=True).splitlines()[:limit]; print(json.dumps({'processes':out}))

import json,subprocess,sys; limit=int(sys.argv[1]); cmd=['ps','-eo','pid=,comm=,pcpu=,pmem=','--sort=-pcpu']; out=subprocess.check_output(cmd, text=True).splitlines()[:limit]; print(json.dumps({'processes':out}))
